title: Milton International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Milton International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Milton International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton International Enterprises:
Milton International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
